category_sources: Official gpsd project page says gpsd monitors GPS/GNSS/AIS receivers and exposes data over TCP port 2947.
source_facts.description says gpsd is a Global Positioning System daemon.
display_name_sources: Official project site and GitLab repository use gpsd.
docs_sources: Official gpsd site has a Documentation section and manual pages including gpsd(8).
repo_sources: Official gpsd project page links Repository under Repository, Downloads and Packages; GitLab repository page identifies gpsd/gpsd.
tags_sources: Official gpsd pages describe GPS/GNSS/AIS receivers, TCP port 2947, and NMEA-related protocols.
source_facts.executables lists gpsd and related client tools.
